name: Anchorage Digital Federally Chartered Crypto Bank API
what_it_does: Anchorage Digital federally chartered crypto bank REST API for institutional investors, hedge funds, corporate treasuries, and financial institutions to access OCC-chartered digital asset banking services including custody, staking, lending, trading, and settlement — providing federally regulated institutional crypto banking with the security assurances of a national bank charter for digital asset management. Enables AI agents to manage digital asset custody for federally regulated institutional crypto safekeeping automation, handle staking for institutional proof-of-stake yield automation, access trading for institutional crypto execution automation, retrieve portfolio for institutional digital asset accounting automation, manage lending for crypto-collateralized loan automation, handle compliance reporting for institutional regulatory disclosure automation, access multi-sig workflow for institutional approval governance automation, retrieve settlement for institutional crypto transaction finality automation, manage governance for on-chain voting delegation automation, and integrate Anchorage with institutional investment management, corporate treasury, and bank prime brokerage platforms for regulated digital asset banking automation.
use_cases: Managing institutional digital asset custody under OCC federal bank charter for regulated financial institution automation agents
Executing institutional crypto staking for ETH, SOL, and other PoS assets under federal regulatory framework automation agents
Integrating Anchorage custody with institutional investment management platforms for corporate treasury automation agents
Accessing crypto lending and borrowing against digital asset collateral through Anchorage's banking platform automation agents
not_for: Retail consumer crypto services (Anchorage is institutional-only digital bank)
DeFi protocol integration (Anchorage is centralized federally chartered bank, not DeFi)
Micro-transactions or high-frequency retail (Anchorage serves institutional minimums)
best_when: An institutional investor, hedge fund, corporate treasury, or regulated financial institution wanting AI agents to manage digital assets through Anchorage Digital's OCC-chartered federal banking platform with the strongest regulatory assurances in crypto custody.
avoid_when: OCC FEDERAL BANK CHARTER COMPLIANCE: Anchorage operates as OCC-chartered national digital asset bank; automated state-licensed or unregulated crypto assumption creates wrong regulatory framework; automated must understand federal banking regulations apply to Anchorage services. INSTITUTIONAL MINIMUMS REQUIRED: Anchorage serves institutional clients with significant AUM minimums; automated retail-scale assumption creates below_minimum_aum for small holdings; automated must meet Anchorage institutional client requirements. ONBOARDING IS RIGOROUS: Anchorage institutional onboarding requires extensive AML/KYC, institutional due diligence, legal agreements; automated fast API access assumption creates multi-week onboarding timeline; automated must plan for comprehensive institutional banking onboarding. GOVERNANCE FEATURES ARE COMPLEX: Anchorage supports on-chain governance delegation for staking; automated simple custody assumption misses governance complexity; automated must implement governance delegation workflow for PoS asset holdings.

auth.notes: Anchorage uses API key + cryptographic signing for institutional API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Diogo Mónica and Nathan McCauley. First federally chartered digital asset bank in the US (OCC 2021). Products: Custody, staking, trading, lending, settlements, governance, compliance. SDKs: None public. OCC chartered. Backed by Goldman Sachs, Visa, Andreessen Horowitz, Singapore GIC. Competes with Fireblocks and BitGo for institutional crypto custody.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public sandbox; institutional evaluation only
pricing.paid_tiers: AUM-based custody fees; staking fees; trading commissions; lending rates; custom institutional pricing
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. OCC federally chartered bank. AUM-based fees. Institutional-only. Digital asset banking.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; institutional transaction and custody APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: CRYPTOGRAPHIC SIGNING REQUIRED: Anchorage API requires cryptographic signing of requests using institutional private key; automated API-key-only assumption creates authentication_invalid; automated must implement cryptographic request signing with institutional key pair

MULTI-APPROVER GOVERNANCE: Anchorage custody operations require configured multi-party approval quorum; automated instant single-party transaction assumption creates awaiting_approval state; automated must implement institutional approval workflow respecting quorum requirements

NO PUBLIC SANDBOX: Anchorage does not offer public sandbox environment; automated sandbox testing assumption creates no test environment; automated development requires Anchorage's institutional evaluation program before API testing

STAKING GOVERNANCE COMPLEXITY: Anchorage supports on-chain governance voting delegation for staked assets; automated staking-without-governance assumption misses governance participation for institutional PoS holders; automated should implement governance delegation and voting for complete staking service

FEDERAL BANKING REGULATIONS APPLY: As OCC-chartered bank, Anchorage operates under federal banking regulations including BSA, FinCEN, and OCC guidance; automated crypto-startup regulatory assumption misses federal bank compliance requirements; automated must understand and comply with federal banking regulations when using Anchorage services
agent_readiness.security_notes: OCC-chartered federal crypto bank. OCC, BSA, FinCEN, OFAC. API key + cryptographic signing. US. Institutional digital asset and banking data.

security_score_components.security_notes: OCC federal crypto bank. OCC, BSA, FinCEN. API key + crypto signing. US. Institutional digital asset data.
